description: An in-range but unrecognized env.DISABLE_TELEMETRY string produces an unknown result without disclosing the raw value; cleanupPeriodDays is absent and is separately unknown as unset.

findings.message: Cannot determine local session transcript retention window: cleanupPeriodDays is unset in the user-level config; Claude Code's documented 30-day default applies absent an override, but uninspected managed, project, local, or CLI-flag layers may supply a different effective value.
findings.unknown_reason: cleanupPeriodDays is unset in the user-level config; Claude Code's documented 30-day default applies absent an override, but uninspected managed, project, local, or CLI-flag layers may supply a different effective value.

findings.message: Cannot determine usage-metrics telemetry opt-out posture: env.DISABLE_TELEMETRY is set to a value other than the documented opt-out token "1" — raw values are never displayed
findings.unknown_reason: env.DISABLE_TELEMETRY is set to a value other than the documented opt-out token "1" — raw values are never displayed
